description: Thin crispy biscuit sticks coated in rich milk chocolate. Japan's most iconic snack, perfect for sharing. A must-try treat loved by all ages.
Classic Pocky sticks dipped in sweet strawberry-flavored chocolate. A fruity twist on the original, popular among kids and adults alike.
Premium Japanese KitKat featuring layers of crispy wafer coated in smooth matcha white chocolate. A beloved souvenir straight from Japan.
Limited-edition cherry blossom flavored KitKat with a delicate floral sweetness. A beautiful seasonal treat unique to Japan.
A crunchy chocolate bar packed with cocoa cookies and crispy bits. Famous for its bold flavor and incredible value — a convenience store legend.
Adorable cone-shaped chocolates with a strawberry top and milk chocolate base. Bite-sized, colorful, and irresistibly delicious.
Silky smooth milk chocolate pieces that melt in your mouth. Each box contains individually wrapped squares perfect for savoring slowly.
Cute koala-shaped biscuits filled with creamy chocolate. Each cookie features a unique koala illustration — fun to eat and collect.
Whole roasted almonds enrobed in premium Glico milk chocolate. A satisfying combination of crunch and creaminess in every bite.
Crunchy macadamia nuts wrapped in velvety Meiji milk chocolate. A rich and indulgent treat, perfect as a gift or personal reward.
Crispy pretzel-like tubes filled with smooth chocolate cream inside. The clever inside-out design keeps your fingers clean while snacking.
Colorful candy-coated chocolate drops with a satisfying crunch shell and creamy milk chocolate center. Great for sharing by the handful.
Adorable mushroom-shaped biscuits topped with milk chocolate caps. One of Japan's most beloved snacks with a perfect biscuit-to-chocolate ratio.
Bamboo shoot-shaped cookies coated in rich chocolate. The rival to Kinoko no Yama — pick your side in Japan's most delicious debate.
Roasted peanuts coated in a thin layer of sweet milk chocolate. A classic Japanese snack loved for its satisfying crunch and affordable price.
Hokkaido's most famous souvenir — delicate langue de chat cookies sandwiched with white or milk chocolate. Elegant, buttery, and utterly refined.
Tokyo's signature souvenir cake — soft sponge filled with smooth banana-flavored cream. Individually wrapped and beautifully presented.
Soft and chewy rice cake dusted with premium matcha powder. A traditional Japanese confection with an earthy green tea flavor and pillowy texture.
Pillowy soft rice cake filled with sweet red bean paste. A staple of Japanese wagashi culture, enjoyed year-round as a tea-time treat.
A firm, elegant jelly made from red bean paste and agar. This classic Japanese confection is subtly sweet and pairs beautifully with green tea.
A nostalgic Japanese tin of assorted fruit-flavored hard candies. Iconic packaging and timeless flavors make this a cherished gift across generations.
Delicate star-shaped sugar crystals in pastel colors. These traditional Japanese sweets have been enjoyed since the 16th century and make a charming gift.
Crispy chocolate biscuits topped with a layer of smooth milk chocolate. A refined everyday treat from Bourbon, one of Japan's top confectionery brands.
Soft, fluffy sponge cake filled with rich custard cream. A comforting Japanese snack cake with a light texture and gentle sweetness.
Light and airy puffed snacks bursting with savory shrimp flavor. Made by Calbee, Japan's leading snack brand — addictively crunchy and hard to put down.
Traditional Japanese rice crackers seasoned with soy sauce and salt. Baked to a satisfying crunch, these are a timeless and wholesome Japanese snack.
Thick-cut potato sticks lightly salted and baked for a natural potato flavor. Calbee's premium potato snack — more satisfying than ordinary chips.
Crunchy roasted green peas coated in a sharp wasabi seasoning. A bold and spicy snack with a satisfying kick — great for wasabi lovers.
Tangy and salty dried Japanese plum snacks with a bold, distinctive flavor. A traditional taste of Japan loved for its unique sweet-sour punch.
Crispy potato chips seasoned with savory seaweed flavor. A uniquely Japanese take on classic chips with a subtle umami depth in every bite.
Slender baked pretzel sticks seasoned with tangy tomato flavor. Less sweet than Pocky, Pretz is a savory snack great for any time of day.
Soft and juicy gummy candies bursting with sweet white peach flavor. Made with real fruit juice — a popular Japanese summer treat.
Chewy grape-flavored gummies with an intensely fruity taste. Made with Kyoho grape juice for an authentic and refreshing Japanese candy experience.
Classic Japanese marble-stoppered soda in the iconic original lemon-lime flavor. Popping the marble is part of the fun — a nostalgic summer drink.
Sweet and refreshing Japanese melon-flavored soda with a vibrant green color. A staple of Japanese cafes and a beloved retro flavor.
Rich and smooth canned coffee from Suntory's legendary Boss brand. A staple of Japanese vending machines — bold flavor, ready to drink anywhere.
Pure and refreshing unsweetened green tea brewed from carefully selected Japanese leaves. Clean, smooth taste with natural antioxidants.
Pioneering Japanese canned coffee with a balanced blend of rich coffee and light milk. UCC invented the canned coffee category back in 1969.
Bubbly and refreshing soda with Calpis's signature mild yogurt-like sweetness. A uniquely Japanese flavor that's light, tangy, and completely addictive.
Bold grape-flavored Fanta with a distinctly sweeter Japanese formula. A popular fizzy drink available in flavors exclusive to Japan.
A refreshing blended herbal tea made from 16 carefully selected ingredients. Caffeine-free, lightly roasted, and perfect for everyday hydration.
Japan's top-selling instant ramen with springy noodles in a rich soy sauce broth. A comforting bowl ready in minutes — a pantry staple across Japan.
The world's first cup noodle, invented in Japan. Iconic seafood-flavored broth with tender noodles — just add hot water and enjoy in 3 minutes.
